// ── PRICE_DATA_START (auto-updated by update_accuracy.py — do not edit manually) ── const PRICE_DATA = {}; const PRICE_DATA_UPDATED = "never"; // ── PRICE_DATA_END ── // ── PERFORMANCE_DATA_START (auto-updated by update_performance.py — do not edit manually) ── const PERFORMANCE_DATA = {"updated": "never", "stats_1yr": null, "stats_3yr": null}; // ── PERFORMANCE_DATA_END ── // ── Allocation-history pagination state ──────────────────────────────── const PAGE_SIZE = 30; let currentFilter = "all"; let currentPage = 0; let searchTerm = ""; // Hide the most-recent allocation row from the public Backtest page — // today's live signal is a paid feature (visible on the Daily Signal page). // ALLOC_DATA is newest-first, so dropping index 0 hides today. const PUBLIC_ALLOC = (typeof ALLOC_DATA !== "undefined") ? ALLOC_DATA.slice(1) : []; let filteredData = PUBLIC_ALLOC.slice(); function pillFor(ticker, value) { if (value === "-" || !value) return '-'; var cls = "pill-" + ticker.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, ""); return '' + value + ''; } function fmtDate(iso) { var d = new Date(iso + "T00:00:00"); return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", {weekday:"short", month:"short", day:"numeric", year:"numeric"}); } // ── Per-row accuracy / spike helpers ───────────────────────────────────── function accuracyFor(r, sig) { if (sig.alwaysAccurate) { var lbl = sig.accLabel ? ' ' + sig.accLabel + '' : ''; return { html: 'OK' + lbl, hit: true, isLev: false }; } if (!sig.underlying) return { html: '-', hit: null, isLev: false }; var map = (typeof PRICE_DATA !== "undefined") ? PRICE_DATA[sig.underlying] : null; if (!map) return { html: 'no data', hit: null, isLev: true }; var dates = Object.keys(map).sort(); var next = null; for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) { if (dates[i] > r[0]) { next = dates[i]; break; } } if (!next) return { html: 'pending', hit: null, isLev: true }; var info = map[next]; var expectedDir = sig.type === "bullish" ? "up" : sig.type === "bearish" ? "down" : null; if (!expectedDir) return { html: '-', hit: null, isLev: false }; var hit = (info.change === expectedDir); return { html: '' + (hit ? 'OK' : 'X') + '' + ' ' + sig.underlying + '' + '' + info.close + '', hit: hit, isLev: true }; } function spikeFor(r, sig, accuracy) { var pct = function(s) { return s === "-" ? 0 : parseFloat(s); }; var maxLev = Math.max(pct(r[1]), pct(r[5]), pct(r[4]), pct(r[8]), pct(r[9])); if (maxLev <= 50) return { html: '-', hit: null }; if (accuracy.hit === null) return { html: '-', hit: null }; return { html: '' + (accuracy.hit ? 'OK' : 'X') + '', hit: accuracy.hit }; } // ── Aggregate stat-card population ────────────────────────────────────── function computeAccuracyStats() { if (typeof ALLOC_DATA === "undefined") return; var today = new Date(); var oneYearAgo = new Date(today); oneYearAgo.setFullYear(today.getFullYear() - 1); var a1H=0, a1T=0, a3H=0, a3T=0; var s1H=0, s1T=0, s3H=0, s3T=0; ALLOC_DATA.forEach(function(r) { var sig = classify(r); var acc = accuracyFor(r, sig); var rd = new Date(r[0] + "T00:00:00"); var in1y = rd >= oneYearAgo; if (sig.alwaysAccurate) { a3T++; a3H++; if (in1y) { a1T++; a1H++; } } else if (acc.hit !== null) { a3T++; if (acc.hit) a3H++; if (in1y) { a1T++; if (acc.hit) a1H++; } } var spk = spikeFor(r, sig, acc); if (spk.hit !== null) { s3T++; if (spk.hit) s3H++; if (in1y) { s1T++; if (spk.hit) s1H++; } } }); function fmt(h,t) { return t === 0 ? "-" : (h/t*100).toFixed(1) + "%"; } function det(h,t) { return t === 0 ? "-" : h + " of " + t; } function setT(id, txt) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = txt; } setT("accuracy-rate-1yr", fmt(a1H,a1T)); setT("accuracy-detail-1yr", det(a1H,a1T) + " trading days"); setT("accuracy-rate-3yr", fmt(a3H,a3T)); setT("accuracy-detail-3yr", det(a3H,a3T) + " trading days"); setT("accuracy-rate", fmt(a3H,a3T)); setT("accuracy-detail", (typeof PRICE_DATA_UPDATED !== "undefined" && PRICE_DATA_UPDATED !== "never") ? "Updated " + PRICE_DATA_UPDATED : "Run update_accuracy.py"); setT("spike-rate-1yr", fmt(s1H,s1T)); setT("spike-detail-1yr", det(s1H,s1T) + " spike days"); setT("spike-rate-3yr", fmt(s3H,s3T)); setT("spike-detail-3yr", det(s3H,s3T) + " spike days"); } function computeStats() { if (typeof ALLOC_DATA === "undefined") return; var bearish=0, bullish=0; ALLOC_DATA.forEach(function(r) { var sig = classify(r); if (sig.type === "bearish") bearish++; if (sig.type === "bullish") bullish++; }); var bc = document.getElementById("bearish-count"); var blc = document.getElementById("bullish-count"); if (bc) bc.textContent = bearish; if (blc) blc.textContent = bullish; } // ── Filter / search ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── function applyFilter() { if (typeof ALLOC_DATA === "undefined") return; // PUBLIC_ALLOC = ALLOC_DATA minus today's row (subscriber-only). filteredData = PUBLIC_ALLOC.filter(function(r) { var sig = classify(r); if (currentFilter === "bearish" && sig.type !== "bearish") return false; if (currentFilter === "bullish" && sig.type !== "bullish") return false; if (currentFilter === "special" && ["bearish","bullish","preserve","gold"].indexOf(sig.type) === -1) return false; if (searchTerm) { var blob = r.join(" ").toLowerCase(); if (blob.indexOf(searchTerm) === -1) return false; } return true; }); currentPage = 0; render(); } function setFilter(mode) { currentFilter = mode; document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn").forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove("active"); }); var btn = document.getElementById("btn-" + mode); if (btn) btn.classList.add("active"); applyFilter(); } function filterTable() { var box = document.getElementById("searchBox"); searchTerm = box ? box.value.toLowerCase().trim() : ""; applyFilter(); } // ── Render table + pagination ────────────────────────────────────────── function render() { var tbody = document.getElementById("allocBody"); if (!tbody) return; var start = currentPage * PAGE_SIZE; var slice = filteredData.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE); tbody.innerHTML = slice.map(function(r) { var date=r[0], upro=r[1], gldm=r[2], usd=r[3], tecl=r[4], tqqq=r[5], sgov=r[6], gld=r[7], udow=r[8], sqqq=r[9], psq=r[10]; var sig = classify(r); var isSpecial = sig.type !== "core"; var sigColor = sig.type === "bearish" ? "#f87171" : sig.type === "bullish" ? "#4ade80" : sig.type === "preserve" ? "#fbbf24" : sig.type === "gold" ? "#fde68a" : "#94a3b8"; var acc = accuracyFor(r, sig); var spk = spikeFor(r, sig, acc); return '' + '' + fmtDate(date) + '' + '' + pillFor("upro", upro) + '' + '' + pillFor("gldm", gldm) + '' + '' + pillFor("usd", usd) + '' + '' + pillFor("tecl", tecl) + '' + '' + pillFor("tqqq", tqqq) + '' + '' + pillFor("sgov", sgov) + '' + '' + pillFor("gld", gld) + '' + '' + pillFor("udow", udow) + '' + '' + pillFor("sqqq", sqqq) + '' + '' + pillFor("psq", psq) + '' + '' + sig.text + '' + '' + acc.html + '' + '' + spk.html + '' + ''; }).join(""); var rc = document.getElementById("rowCount"); if (rc) rc.textContent = filteredData.length + " rows"; var pages = Math.ceil(filteredData.length / PAGE_SIZE); var pg = document.getElementById("pagination"); if (!pg) return; if (pages <= 1) { pg.innerHTML = ""; return; } var html = ""; var showSet = {}; showSet[0]=true; showSet[pages-1]=true; showSet[currentPage]=true; for (var i = 1; i <= 2; i++) { if (currentPage - i >= 0) showSet[currentPage - i] = true; if (currentPage + i < pages) showSet[currentPage + i] = true; } var showList = Object.keys(showSet).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;}); if (currentPage > 0) html += ''; var prev = -1; for (var j = 0; j < showList.length; j++) { var p = showList[j]; if (prev !== -1 && p - prev > 1) html += '...'; html += ''; prev = p; } if (currentPage < pages - 1) html += ''; pg.innerHTML = html; } function gotoPage(p) { currentPage = p; render(); var tbl = document.getElementById("allocTable"); if (tbl) tbl.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth", block:"start"}); } // ── Populate the 1-Year / 3-Year stat cards from PERFORMANCE_DATA ───── function renderPerformance() { function setT(id, txt) { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) el.textContent = txt; } function fmtPct(n) { if (n == null) return "—"; var s = n.toFixed(2) + "%"; if (n > 0) s = "+" + s; if (s.charAt(0) === "-") s = "−" + s.slice(1); return s; } function fmtDD(n) { return n == null ? "—" : n.toFixed(2) + "%"; } var s1 = (typeof PERFORMANCE_DATA !== "undefined") ? PERFORMANCE_DATA.stats_1yr : null; var s3 = (typeof PERFORMANCE_DATA !== "undefined") ? PERFORMANCE_DATA.stats_3yr : null; if (s1) { setT("perf-1yr-ann", fmtPct(s1.ann_return)); setT("perf-1yr-cum", fmtPct(s1.cum_return)); setT("perf-1yr-dd", fmtDD(s1.max_drawdown)); setT("perf-1yr-period", s1.start_date + " to " + s1.end_date + " (" + s1.n_days + " trading days)"); } else { setT("perf-1yr-ann", "—"); setT("perf-1yr-cum", "—"); setT("perf-1yr-dd", "—"); setT("perf-1yr-period", "Run update_performance.py to populate"); } if (s3) { setT("perf-3yr-ann", fmtPct(s3.ann_return)); setT("perf-3yr-cum", fmtPct(s3.cum_return)); setT("perf-3yr-dd", fmtDD(s3.max_drawdown)); setT("perf-3yr-period", s3.start_date + " to " + s3.end_date + " (" + s3.n_days + " trading days)"); setT("perf-3yr-value", "$" + Math.round(s3.end_value).toLocaleString()); setT("perf-3yr-details", fmtPct(s3.cum_return) + " cumulative return · " + fmtPct(s3.ann_return) + " annualized return · Max Drawdown " + fmtDD(s3.max_drawdown)); setT("perf-3yr-label", "$" + Math.round(s3.start_value).toLocaleString() + " Invested - " + s3.start_date + " (" + s3.n_days + " trading days)"); } else { setT("perf-3yr-ann", "—"); setT("perf-3yr-cum", "—"); setT("perf-3yr-dd", "—"); setT("perf-3yr-period", "Run update_performance.py to populate"); } if (typeof PERFORMANCE_DATA !== "undefined" && PERFORMANCE_DATA.updated && PERFORMANCE_DATA.updated !== "never") { setT("perf-last-updated", "Stats updated " + PERFORMANCE_DATA.updated); } } // Initial paint applyFilter(); computeStats(); computeAccuracyStats(); renderPerformance(); ───────────────────────────────────── function render() { var tbody = document.getElementById("allocBody"); if (!tbody) return; var start = currentPage * PAGE_SIZE; var slice = filteredData.slice(start, start + PAGE_SIZE); tbody.innerHTML = slice.map(function(r) { var date=r[0], upro=r[1], gldm=r[2], usd=r[3], tecl=r[4], tqqq=r[5], sgov=r[6], gld=r[7], udow=r[8], sqqq=r[9], psq=r[10]; var sig = classify(r); var isSpecial = sig.type !== "core"; var sigColor = sig.type === "bearish" ? "#f87171" : sig.type === "bullish" ? "#4ade80" : sig.type === "preserve" ? "#fbbf24" : sig.type === "gold" ? "#fde68a" : "#94a3b8"; var acc = accuracyFor(r, sig); var spk = spikeFor(r, sig, acc); return '' + '' + fmtDate(date) + '' + '' + pillFor("upro", upro) + '' + '' + pillFor("gldm", gldm) + '' + '' + pillFor("usd", usd) + '' + '' + pillFor("tecl", tecl) + '' + '' + pillFor("tqqq", tqqq) + '' + '' + pillFor("sgov", sgov) + '' + '' + pillFor("gld", gld) + '' + '' + pillFor("udow", udow) + '' + '' + pillFor("sqqq", sqqq) + '' + '' + pillFor("psq", psq) + '' + '' + sig.text + '' + '' + acc.html + '' + '' + spk.html + '' + ''; }).join(""); var rc = document.getElementById("rowCount"); if (rc) rc.textContent = filteredData.length + " rows"; var pages = Math.ceil(filteredData.length / PAGE_SIZE); var pg = document.getElementById("pagination"); if (!pg) return; if (pages <= 1) { pg.innerHTML = ""; return; } var html = ""; var showSet = {}; showSet[0]=true; showSet[pages-1]=true; showSet[currentPage]=true; for (var i = 1; i <= 2; i++) { if (currentPage - i >= 0) showSet[currentPage - i] = true; if (currentPage + i < pages) showSet[currentPage + i] = true; } var showList = Object.keys(showSet).map(Number).sort(function(a,b){return a-b;}); if (currentPage > 0) html += ''; var prev = -1; for (var j = 0; j < showList.length; j++) { var p = showList[j]; if (prev !== -1 && p - prev > 1) html += '...'; html += ''; prev = p; } if (currentPage < pages - 1) html += ''; pg.innerHTML = html; } function gotoPage(p) { currentPage = p; render(); var tbl = document.getElementById("allocTable"); if (tbl) tbl.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth", block:"start"}); } applyFilter(); computeStats(); computeAccuracyStats(); ript> () { if (typeof Chart === "undefined") return; var canvas = document.getElementById("growthChart"); if (!canvas) return; var labels = ["May 2020","Aug 2020","Nov 2020","Feb 2021","May 2021","Aug 2021","Nov 2021","Feb 2022","May 2022","Aug 2022","Nov 2022","Feb 2023","May 2023","Aug 2023","Nov 2023","Feb 2024","May 2024","Aug 2024","Nov 2024","Feb 2025","May 2025","Aug 2025","Nov 2025","Feb 2026","May 2026"]; var strategy = [10000,10300,11000,12000,12500,13000,13700,14000,15200,15700,16400,16700,17000,17800,18500,19400,20700,21500,22900,22200,23800,24800,24400,25500,27197]; var spy = [10000,11400,13100,14500,15800,17400,18900,17200,13600,14200,15100,16000,16600,17600,18500,20200,21800,22500,24600,22400,24200,25800,25000,24200,26650]; new Chart(canvas.getContext("2d"), { type: "line", data: { labels: labels, datasets: [ { label:"BLEE Strategy", data: strategy, borderColor:"#10b981", backgroundColor:"rgba(16,185,129,0.10)", borderWidth:2.5, fill:true, tension:0.4, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:6, pointHoverBackgroundColor:"#10b981" }, { label:"S&P 500 (SPY)", data: spy, borderColor:"#f472b6", backgroundColor:"rgba(244,114,182,0.06)", borderWidth:2, fill:true, tension:0.4, pointRadius:0, pointHoverRadius:6, pointHoverBackgroundColor:"#f472b6" } ]}, options: { responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, interaction:{ mode:"index", intersect:false }, plugins:{ legend:{ display:false }, tooltip:{ backgroundColor:"#1e293b", titleColor:"rgba(255,255,255,0.70)", bodyColor:"#fff", borderColor:"rgba(255,255,255,0.10)", borderWidth:1, padding:12, callbacks:{ label:function(ctx){ var v=ctx.raw, p=((v-10000)/10000*100).toFixed(1); return " "+ctx.dataset.label+": $"+v.toLocaleString()+" ("+(p>0?"+":"")+p+"%)"; } } } }, scales:{ x:{ grid:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }, ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, maxTicksLimit:8 } }, y:{ grid:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }, ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, callback:function(v){ return "$"+v.toLocaleString(); } } } } } }); })(); or:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }, ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, maxTicksLimit:8 } }, y:{ grid:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }, ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, callback:function(v){ return "$"+v.toLocaleString(); } } } } } }); })(); , ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, maxTicksLimit:8 } }, y:{ grid:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" }, ticks:{ color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.35)", font:{ size:11 }, callback:function(v){ return "$"+v.toLocaleString(); } } } } } }); })();
